text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The end of the year. I hear that in the west, it's a
time people spend quietly with their family.
However...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A quiet winter holiday... with just the two of us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's... how it usually is, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since we're always spending quiet time together,
it's not especially significant for us. So this time,
we head out for dinner.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That roast dinner... was really delicious. The
sourness of the cranberries was a nice touch...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Should we order some more gingerbread?
Also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The other desserts on the menu look beautiful...
Could we get some of those too?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is there... something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... It is... normal, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I always had Manhattan Cafe down as the gloomy
type, but having dinner with her today, I don't
really get that impression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's changed during our time together.
Or perhaps I'm only just seeing her true nature
now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Have you ever been to Manhattan?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's a place that shares my name... I've never been
there myself, though...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Visiting Manhattan, covered in a blanket of
snow... That's a little dream of mine...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I want to see it for myself, just once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it... America probably
does feel out of reach to a lot of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We could go there someday, in lieu of our
canceled international race...
choice_data_list:
But you realize it's mostly dirt in America
though, right?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh... Dirt?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan... The holidays... Dirt. You mean
races?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But I wasn't talking about... racing abroad...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um, was that a... joke?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's a relief. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want to go sightseeing in Manhattan, not
compete there. I'd try one of those non-alcoholic
fizz cocktails, and spot celebrities from afar...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even her dream sounds normal. I get to spend this
quiet holiday witnessing Manhattan Cafe's true
nature.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want to go sightseeing in Manhattan, not
compete there. I'd try one of those non-alcoholic
fizz cocktails, and spot celebrities from afar...
choice_data_list: You want to go celebrity spotting?
You want to go celebrity spotting?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm slightly... curious... I'd like to see the
brightest stars in the place that shares my name.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry... Even if I were right next to them,
there's no way anyone would notice me staring.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've always been told I don't have much of a
presence. No one would know I was there...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No one at all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, a group wearing Umamusume caps
passes by in front of the open cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this point, Manhattan Cafe is a famous runner
in her own right. It'd be a hassle if she got
swarmed by fans...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry, Trainer. No one... is
going to notice me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Because... I'm a shadow...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Wait, isn't that Manhattan Cafe over there?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're right. She looks like she's having a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No one is going to notice me... No one...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: And it looks like she's with someone! Hey, they seem kinda close, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Maybe they're out for a festive meal?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No one... is going to notice me. No one... at all.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, she's red as an apple.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
She's so cute when she's blushing! And I thought I
couldn't be a bigger fan!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They've... noticed me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When you're as famous as Manhattan Cafe, it
gets tough to lay low. At this point, she's already
a celebrity.
